notes: v2.1.206 (2026-07-10T01:45:26Z) ~28h after v2.1.205. Sizable QoL + regression-fix release with ~30 distinct load-bearing bullets. Load-bearing new primitives: (a) /cd directory-path suggestions (matches /add-dir); (b) new /doctor check that proposes trimming checked-in CLAUDE.md files (Claude-derivable content); (c) /commit-push-pr auto-allows git push to configured push remote (remote.pushDefault or sole configured remote) in addition to origin; (d) gateway /login supports Anthropic-operated public gateway endpoints; (e) EnterWorktree asks for confirmation before entering git worktree outside .claude/worktrees/; (f) background agents upgrade in-background right after Claude Code update (no more slow stale-session upgrade on attach); (g) /code-review findings quality improvements on claude-opus-4-8 across all effort levels; (h) agents-view status column uses full terminal width (was 64-char truncation); (i) Ctrl+X permanently removes completed session in agents view. Bug fixes: expired-login misleading error, --resume/--continue keyboard on startup, MCP per-server request_timeout_ms respected in --mcp-config/.mcp.json (was 60s default), CLAUDE_CODE_EXTRA_BODY follows dispatching session for claude agents/--bg background workers, OAuth MCP no longer requires manual re-auth after single failed token refresh, --permission-prompt-tool + MCP cold-start crash fix, /model picker pricing-display fix, desktop-sessions-stuck-showing-running-after-slash-command-mid-turn, Windows agents-view keyboard-input on claude --resume, claude rm daemon-roster leak, /remote-control logged-out message, workflow-detail-view left-arrow phase/agent step-back, /status duplicate warning, false disused-plugin tips + LSP disuse telemetry skew, /doctor Homebrew-cask channel check, fullscreen jump-to-bottom pill Ctrl+End macOS + rebound-chord + wrap-over-transcript, Bedrock awsCredentialExport multi-minute startup-hang on restricted-egress. Feature-additive + regression-fix; no breaking-change to locked kit patterns. Severity ⚠. Extends v2.1.16x-v2.1.20x cluster architect-prompt slot to 14 workstream rows if promoted. Optional integration paths deferred to Monthly Integration: KB-06 §hosted-agent-safety EnterWorktree confirmation + /commit-push-pr push-to-configured-remote auto-allow two-bullet-cluster alongside 07-08 v2.1.205 rm -rf-on-unresolved-variable-guardrail + session-transcript-tampering-block cluster; templates/claude-code/CLAUDE.md.template /doctor CLAUDE.md-trimming-advisory slot; AGENTS.md Background-Agent Lifecycle in-background auto-upgrade + CLAUDE_CODE_EXTRA_BODY bg-worker-propagation extend v2.1.196→v2.1.206 hardening arc; MCP-SERVER-REGISTRY.md MCP request_timeout_ms + OAuth-token-refresh-recovery two-bullet MCP-config-fidelity slot; templates/claude-code/commands/*.md /cd + /code-review opus-4-8 slash-command-consumer slots. Aggregation candidate for Weekly Synthesis 2026-28. Ten-releases-in-ten-days cadence (v2.1.197 07-01 → v2.1.206 07-10).
